name: Fortress of Meropide
title: Fortress of Meropide
desc: "A fastness of bronze and iron will collapse one day, but a city of law and justice will never fall."

skills.desc: When your active character takes DMG or is healed: This card gains 1 point of Prohibition (Can stack. Max 5 stacks). If this card has accumulated 5 Prohibition points, consume 5 Prohibition points and apply Invalidation to 1 random card in your opponent's Hand.
